vibe: Warm, cozy combined with Modern minimal

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-[#2C2523]
hierarchy.label: text-sm font-medium text-[#2C2523]

typography.setup_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for Cormorant Garamond and Outfit to index.css or App.css.

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#EAE3D9]/50
navbar.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-medium hover:text-[#C86A53] transition-colors

hero.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh]
hero.image_style: w-full h-[60vh] md:h-[80vh] object-cover rounded-t-[8rem] rounded-b-xl shadow-lg

food_card.container: group bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-[#EAE3D9]/50
food_card.image: w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500
food_card.title: font-headings text-2xl font-bold text-[#2C2523]

buttons.primary: bg-[#C86A53] hover:bg-[#A84B31] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F0EA] hover:bg-[#EAE3D9] text-[#2C2523] px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#EAE3D9] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C86A53]/20 focus:border-[#C86A53] transition-all outline-none

sections: Food Menu Grid (Categories: Coffee, Indian Street Food, Burgers, Pizza, Pasta, Desserts)

auth.layout: Centered card with soft shadows on an #F4F0EA background.
auth.fields: Email, Password, Name (for signup). Use Shadcn UI forms heavily customized.

food_detail_modal.layout: Split layout. Left: Large square image. Right: Title, description, quantity selector (+/-), Add to Order CTA.
food_detail_modal.ui_element: Shadcn Dialog customized to remove default borders and add rounded-2xl.

admin_panel.layout: Sidebar navigation + Main content area. Uses Swiss high-contrast approach for readability, but retains warm brand colors for primary actions.
admin_panel.features: List of food items (Table), Add/Edit Modal.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text on primary buttons and dark backgrounds meets APCA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='place-order-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use purple gradients or default blue links.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body. Configure these in Tailwind config.
The 'Dashboard' is the main SPA landing page for the user containing the hero, menu, why us, feedback, and contact sections.
The food menu should allow users to click a card, opening a Shadcn Dialog showing the image, description, quantity selector, and an 'Add to Order' button. Adding to order mocks a checkout process.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, and tables (admin), but heavily strip out default styles to match the warm organic theme provided.
Ensure the hero image uses the rounded-t-[8rem] class for that modern arch look.
